Contact.title: Contact
Contact.intro: Freelance, full-time, or collab — automation, CLI/LLM agents, and loop-driven systems in production. If you're hiring, need a bot or commercial site, or want to contribute to OSS, let's talk.

Scope.label: Describe what you need — in your own words. If the site isn't sure, it won't invent scope: it asks for clarification and sends your original text on WhatsApp.
Scope.placeholder: E.g.: I need a landing for my course and a WhatsApp bot to handle people who click the ad…
Scope.clarifyingHeading: Questions so we don't guess the scope
Scope.whatsappMissing: WhatsApp is not configured in this environment — copy the text and reach me via contact.
Scope.example1: Landing page to capture leads from an Instagram campaign
Scope.example2: Institutional site for my clinic with WhatsApp
Scope.example3: WhatsApp bot with AI to qualify leads
Scope.example4: Automation that reads a spreadsheet and updates the CRM
